channel.title: Awesome Academic Research Skills
channel.description: 每日自动更新的学术论文与科研 Agent Skill 排行榜 · Daily ranking of academic research agent skills on GitHub

item.title: Yuan1z0825/nature-skills (27,224★, +2126/7d)
item.description: 符合nature论文学术表达和科研绘图的Skill

item.title: Imbad0202/academic-research-skills (37,000★, +1196/7d)
item.description: Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize

item.title: K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills (30,524★, +684/7d)
item.description: Turn any AI agent into an AI Scientist. The #1 Agent Skills library for science, used by 160,000+ scientists worldwide. 140 ready-to-use skills plus 100+ scientific databases covering biology, chemis…

item.title: Imbad0202/academic-research-skills-codex (5,812★, +555/7d)
item.description: Codex-native Academic Research Skills suite for human-in-the-loop academic research workflows

item.title: HKUSTDial/Supervisor-Skills (3,759★, +292/7d)
item.description: 将博导十年科研经验炼化为可直接调用的 AI 技能。从 Idea 构思到论文投稿，你的 AI 科研副导师。

item.title: Master-cai/Research-Paper-Writing-Skills (4,895★, +286/7d)
item.description: Skill package for ML/CV/NLP paper writing, curated and adapted from Prof. Peng Sida's open notes for Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini.

item.title: wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep (13,161★, +257/7d)
item.description: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Lightweight Markdown-only skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation. No framework, no lock-in — works w…

item.title: Orchestra-Research/AI-Research-SKILLs (10,521★, +223/7d)
item.description: Comprehensive open-source library of AI research and engineering skills for any AI model. Package the skills and your claude code/codex/gemini agent will be an AI research agent with full horsepower.…

item.title: Weizhena/Deep-Research-skills (1,571★, +122/7d)
item.description: Structured deep research skill for Claude Code/Open Code/Codex with human-in-the-loop control

item.title: pedrohcgs/claude-code-my-workflow (1,385★, +46/7d)
item.description: A ready-to-fork Claude Code template for academics using LaTeX/Beamer + R. Multi-agent review, quality gates, adversarial QA, and replication protocols.
